"             // Find all pending alerts to annul:\n             // 1. From previous phases\n             // 2. From earlier cycles of the SAME task (same name)\n             const currentAlert = alertas.find(alt => alt.pauta.idlaborespauta === pautaId);\n             const currentName = currentAlert?.pauta?.laboresnombre;\n             const currentEmisionTime = currentAlert ? new Date(currentAlert.fechaEmision).getTime() : 0;\n             const pIdx = FASE_ORDER[fase] || 99;\n\n             const priorAlerts = alertas.filter(alt => {\n               const altPhase = alt.pauta.laborespautafase || 'general';\n               const altIdx = FASE_ORDER[altPhase] || 99;\n               \n               // Strictly previous phase\n               if (altIdx < pIdx) return true;\n\n               // Same phase but earlier target date/emision cycle of the same task type\n               const isSameTask = currentName && alt.pauta?.laboresnombre === currentName;\n               const altEmisionTime = new Date(alt.fechaEmision).getTime();\n               if (isSameTask && altIdx === pIdx && altEmisionTime < currentEmisionTime) {\n                 return true;\n               }\n\n               return false;\n             });\n\n             // Combine current alert and all prior pending alerts\n             const newCompletions = [\n               { idpauta: pautaId, fase },\n               ...priorAlerts.map(alt => ({\n                 idpauta: alt.pauta.idlaborespauta,\n                 fase: alt.pauta.laborespautafase || 'general'\n               }))\n             ];"
